events.name: Mariano's 30th / Chicago
events.context: Mariano turns 30 on March 19th. Plan includes a 1-2 night warm backpacking trip first (Mar 14-15), then fly to Chicago for the birthday celebration. Flights to Chicago already booked.
events.hook: Book flights to backpacking destination, find warm backpacking spot for mid-March, figure out REI gear rentals, and finalize Mariano's gift.

actions.name: Find warm backpacking destination (1-2 night, mid-March)
Book flight from backpacking to Chicago
Figure out REI gear rentals (backpack, tent, sleeping bag)

events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana, March 23 - April 7. Route: Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. Currently in activity planning and shopping phase. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping, validate insurance/prescription requirements, and finalize activity plans for Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
